description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the Docker image registry.gitlab.com/paddy-hack/nikola with no additional services. Define a pages job that runs the command nikola build, stores the public/ directory as an artifact, and is limited to the master branch. Define a test job that also runs nikola build, runs on all branches except master, and uses the default test stage. Both jobs inherit the default stages, and the pages job deploys to GitLab Pages.
